response.overview: Released in 1969, Alingon is a dramatic feature film helmed by acclaimed director Subhash Dutta. The narrative was brought to the screen through a collaborative screenplay written by Mehbubur Rahman and the director himself, Subhash Dutta. Anchoring the film is a central trio of performers, starring Subhash Dutta in a leading role alongside Farid Ahmed and Sharmili Ahmed.
response.title: Alingon
